{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322013401E8562871A3BD873EBD3A"}"},"total":3185},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7246650839354802976","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书争议挺多的，有人说主角这不合适啊，那不合适啊，写的太平淡了，没高潮什么的，我不觉得呀，看代入一点就会发现这本书里确实很多地方读起来都是感情相当充沛的，作者脑洞又超级大，看着主角玩弄禁忌的时候，我真的整个人都看兴奋起来[舔屏]，血肉改造什么的，“植树”啊啥的...这里吞，那里吞[奸笑]，又不是像某些种马文[撇嘴]，我怎么动不动就喜欢上你了什么的，然后就...[吐]，这感情经历什么东西的，写的都不错，很明确的心，很坚定的意志，很自然的感情流露，而且作者真的很用心啊，没有乱改设定啊什么的，老米给出的所有的信息，那都是一点都不差，我不管别人怎么看，反正我自己是很喜欢这本书的，希望作者能够一直写下去，我也会一直看下去的[送心][直到终结][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687242481,"group_id":"7140155041532349481","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N43n0WktIYlzRZCGCXlPxq+NmRTJwFl+SUVKikMLT/KA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/10e2be2f2c1a41b48d943af13124721f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702548&x-signature=QRL0AovbUXsV4OsX36mclVuQtGQ%3D","user_id":"3922662189965183","user_name":"星芸汐月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3922662189965183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646321842,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140155041532349481","book_info":{"abstract":"生灵玄妙而神奇，每个人都有九大系统。
　　运动系统、消化系统、呼吸系统、免疫系统、神经系统、循环系统……
　　这些精密的系统，不起眼，但非常强大。
　　穿越提瓦特后，姜逸的九大系统发生了异变，只要提供营养和能量，就会将人类的基础能力不断进化。
　　可为剑圣，可为世界，可为原初……具备无限的可能。
　　当我的生命和知识无限拔高，终有一日可触及群星。
　　当修行是知识的探索，而不仅仅是力量的累积的时候。就算身处于名为提瓦特的囚笼，我也可以……成就宇宙至高。
　　天上白玉京，我坐昆仑上。
　　左边是深渊的漆黑，丘丘人和丘丘萨满，深渊法师能歌善舞。
　　右边是七国的主人，推杯换盏，相亲相爱一家人。
　　前方是沉睡的天理，造物主的宝座。
　　后面是一堆结缘的少女，人性的锚点。
　　本书又名：来提瓦特修行的我，是不是搞错了什么？如果给我穿越另外一个世界，我都拿星球当弹珠玩了。丘丘人差点单杀未来神明。未来神明正在吃草。三年河东，莫欺少年……青年穷。
　　穷则独善其身，达则兼济天下。
　　我带提瓦特飞升。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/75ad8b6b07cde955a40fec3140263aea","author":"天有流火","author_id":"","book_id":"7140155041532349481","book_name":"原神：没有神之眼，原人证原初","book_short_name":"我将吃掉众神","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7140157432012997150","read_count":"12522","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5696103"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1567","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,网游,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9b4e4b7d8ae7532402b4c3ab3445a629~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779298442&x-signature=o99THWPXtb0GCkdH1tOM8JCCgcg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1764091845156669","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.7561427e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322013401E8562871A3BD873EBD3A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":146,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":87561,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":35024},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7151209179024311044","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的太好了！在我心目中，这才叫做小说读物。现在的写作门槛太低了，任何软件都充满宣泄情绪的无脑文。这本书读起来没有很激烈的情绪，不会很爽，但读下来以后给人一种舒缓的通透感，看完之后还有再看一次的想法，而不只是消磨时间和引发数值爽感的文字。
（个人认为，不代表大众意见，网络上只要不触碰法律就可以发表自己看法，父母安康，家庭幸福美满，九年义务制教育已读满）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1665020761,"group_id":"7140155041532349481","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"怎么现在一堆开挂吃瘪文啊，头疼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5HCSh/0Tqxb+oh5w7ElOAGIIYNtfI4phSxS3Xq2yNNc","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/87b7427a98324b338cf0df3f8e50892b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708860&x-signature=fmiFFwvY0NGVKl6bObkMKPlFkDQ%3D","user_id":"3334175024218871","user_name":"爱吃荔枝油饼的小黑子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3334175024218871","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140155041532349481","book_info":{"abstract":"生灵玄妙而神奇，每个人都有九大系统。
　　运动系统、消化系统、呼吸系统、免疫系统、神经系统、循环系统……
　　这些精密的系统，不起眼，但非常强大。
　　穿越提瓦特后，姜逸的九大系统发生了异变，只要提供营养和能量，就会将人类的基础能力不断进化。
　　可为剑圣，可为世界，可为原初……具备无限的可能。
　　当我的生命和知识无限拔高，终有一日可触及群星。
　　当修行是知识的探索，而不仅仅是力量的累积的时候。就算身处于名为提瓦特的囚笼，我也可以……成就宇宙至高。
　　天上白玉京，我坐昆仑上。
　　左边是深渊的漆黑，丘丘人和丘丘萨满，深渊法师能歌善舞。
　　右边是七国的主人，推杯换盏，相亲相爱一家人。
　　前方是沉睡的天理，造物主的宝座。
　　后面是一堆结缘的少女，人性的锚点。
　　本书又名：来提瓦特修行的我，是不是搞错了什么？如果给我穿越另外一个世界，我都拿星球当弹珠玩了。丘丘人差点单杀未来神明。未来神明正在吃草。三年河东，莫欺少年……青年穷。
　　穷则独善其身，达则兼济天下。
　　我带提瓦特飞升。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/75ad8b6b07cde955a40fec3140263aea","author":"天有流火","author_id":"","book_id":"7140155041532349481","book_name":"原神：没有神之眼，原人证原初","book_short_name":"我将吃掉众神","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7140157432012997150","read_count":"12522","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5696103"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1567","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,网游,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9b4e4b7d8ae7532402b4c3ab3445a629~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779298442&x-signature=o99THWPXtb0GCkdH1tOM8JCCgcg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1764091845156669","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.112712e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322013401E8562871A3BD873EBD3A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":307,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9112,"reply_count":22,"show_pv":123435},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7384241389239518014","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没别的意思，就想看看这本书我看了多久了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719281091,"group_id":"7140155041532349481","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"122735155225902"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140155041532349481","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读147小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":529398,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7202585930904503051","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"只能说作者在这本书里倾注了大量的心血，出来原神世界里面那些要花大量时间去收集查阅的资料背景设定，还有很多自己设立的东西。人物的性格还原在我个人看来非常的符合，并且这些任务会成长，最经典的例子就是诺艾尔。剧情有跟着主线走，但又有主角自己的生活而不是跟着荧，这样视角下的提瓦特世界感觉更加的真实。我非常喜欢主角的性格，作者把主角写的很真实，真真正正的一个人，一个引意外到提瓦特的人。有缺点，会退缩，会成长，会孤独，在提瓦特有个适应的时间，且依旧会因为璃月与家乡的相似而感怀而孤独；比那些东西完美无缺且无敌的主角更加真实。非常值得细读的一本书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1676982825,"group_id":"7140155041532349481","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"鲸落南北万物生，而你，我的朋友，你是真正的🦈调东西~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny9DrJyanuF6qTje4IeRIVQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cd7de9a995454047baec2d60fc1b39af~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701005&x-signature=pcL7zcZ1%2BOxLDPuo9pFiC2Ff%2FSQ%3D","user_id":"122735155225902","user_name":"帝星飘零荧惑高"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"122735155225902","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776570135,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140155041532349481","book_info":{"abstract":"生灵玄妙而神奇，每个人都有九大系统。
　　运动系统、消化系统、呼吸系统、免疫系统、神经系统、循环系统……
　　这些精密的系统，不起眼，但非常强大。
　　穿越提瓦特后，姜逸的九大系统发生了异变，只要提供营养和能量，就会将人类的基础能力不断进化。
　　可为剑圣，可为世界，可为原初……具备无限的可能。
　　当我的生命和知识无限拔高，终有一日可触及群星。
　　当修行是知识的探索，而不仅仅是力量的累积的时候。就算身处于名为提瓦特的囚笼，我也可以……成就宇宙至高。
　　天上白玉京，我坐昆仑上。
　　左边是深渊的漆黑，丘丘人和丘丘萨满，深渊法师能歌善舞。
　　右边是七国的主人，推杯换盏，相亲相爱一家人。
　　前方是沉睡的天理，造物主的宝座。
　　后面是一堆结缘的少女，人性的锚点。
